title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Haru Urara...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Look at all those plushies in the machine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, they look so soft and huggable! I just wanna squeeeze 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara stares longingly at the plushies with
sparkles in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll stand next to you and cheer you on! You
can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
